title: palmijuncus collinus
intro: Palmijuncus collinus, also known as the Chinese fan palm, is a type of evergreen palm tree native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Palmijuncus collinus include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating coughs, as well as providing antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Herbal preparations of Palmijuncus collinus include tea, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves, stems, and roots in hot water.
